name: BR40 LED Light Bulb – 17W – Energy Star Approved
description: Features: Energy Efficient: 17W LED bulb replaces a 95W incandescent bulb, significantly reducing energy costs. Adjustable CCT: Offers three color temperature options (3000K, 4000K, 5000K) to suit different lighting preferences. Dimmable Functionality: Compatible with most standard dimmers, allowing adjustable brightness levels. Long Lifespan: Provides up to 25,000 hours of consistent, reliable illumination. ETL Certified: Meets rigorous safety and performance standards for indoor lighting applications.
short_desc: Product Attributes: Wattage: 17W Lumen Output: 1400 lm Adjustable CCT: 3000K, 4000K, 5000K Dimmable: Yes Housing Color: White Size: BR40 Base Type: E26 Light Color: WW (Warm White), NW (Neutral White), CW (Cool White) Watt Equivalent: 95W Brightness Rating: 4 of 5 Pack Size: 4 Pack ETL Listed: Yes Height: 6.41 in Diameter: 4.9 in Voltage: 120V AC Warranty: 1 Year CRI (Color Rendering Index): >80 Lifespan: 25,000 hours
